rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Assumptions and guarantees for component ports belong in component type scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion
Only insert AGREE bindings that are valid within the target implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without proper variable representation
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
